title: Is there a way to have a Group Multi-Select in custom Board View Settings?
excerpt: Is there any way to use this type of Group selector in a custom Board View Settings area? (this is a screenshot of what exists in the Dashboards)

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to use this type of Group selector in a custom Board View Settings area? (this is a screenshot of what exists in the Dashboards)

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PolishedGeek,

At this time the multi-select option wouldn’t be available within the board view settings - this would be something that is available for dashboard widgets. That being said - I’ve gone ahead and I’ve passed this over to our dev team as something to look into and possibly add to our roadmap.

-Danny
